rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintff Katy Chmura For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint To Add Karen Huang As A Named Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 02, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF KATY CHMURA's Motion For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint To Add Karen Huang As A Named Defendant continued to September 16, 2016 per stipulation and order. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings to Department 501 no later than September 9, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 02, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT CRAIG LIPTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to December 2, 2016 status of District Court hearing re: bankruptcy settlement. = (501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA GATTI VS. CHARLES FERGUSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 02, 2016 line 3. PLAINTIFF CHARLES FERGUSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication continued to September 27, 2016. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of reply papers (60 pages) and objection to reply to department 501 no later than September 8, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of moving and opposition papers. = (501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: ANA VANDERLEY VS. JAMES D KELLY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 02, 2016 line 5. PLAINTIFF ANA VANDERLEY's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED per CCP 284(2) and Rule of Professional Conduct 3-700(C)(1)(a) and (d). = (501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. PETER A ABBOTT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 02, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT PETER ABBOTT's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to September 21, 2016 per stipulation and August 31, 2016 Ex-Parte Order. = (501/AB)
